★★★★★ 4.9 · In the heart of Cape Town

Stay at the
centre of it all

A landmark address in the heart of Cape Town — refined city-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool, a full spa, and a restaurant that stays open long past dark.

Explore rooms The resort
As featured in
Condé Nast Traveller Travel + Leisure The Times Best City Hotel 2026
Welcome to Royal Hotel

Considered luxury,
at the city's centre

Set on a quiet, tree-lined avenue minutes from the waterfront, with Table Mountain filling the skyline, Royal Hotel is a calm, contemporary retreat built for both business and long, unhurried weekends.

Ninety light-filled rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and bar, a full spa, and two restaurants led by a resident chef. Everything you need, and nothing you don't.

Our story View rooms
1888A city landmark
90Rooms & suites
2Restaurants & bar
24Hour concierge
4.9From 1,300+ guests
Where you'll stay

Rooms that face the water

All rooms & rates
R3,900/night

Deluxe King

Sleeps 2City viewBalcony

A refined room with a private balcony over the city, floods of afternoon light, a king bed and a marble walk-in shower.

View room
R6,800/night

Executive Suite

Sleeps 3Plunge poolLounge

A spacious suite with a separate living room, a private terrace, and uninterrupted views across the city to the mountain.

View suite
R13,500/night

The Penthouse

Sleeps 4RooftopPanoramic

The top of the house — two bedrooms, a wraparound rooftop terrace with a private pool, and a 180° sweep from Table Mountain to the harbour.

View penthouse
The resort

Days you won't want to end

Dine, unwind, repeat. Everything at Royal Hotel is built around one idea — that the best stays are the ones where you do exactly as little, or as much, as you like.

Rooftop pool & bar

A heated rooftop pool, shaded daybeds, and a bar that runs from breakfast to last orders.

The spa

Five treatment rooms, a steam room and sauna, and therapists who know exactly how to undo a long year.

Farm-to-table dining

Two restaurants and a rooftop bar. Produce arrives each morning; the Cape's best wines pour all night.

Good to know

Everything taken care of

In the centre

Steps from the waterfront, the galleries and the best tables in town — right outside the door.

Airport transfers

Twenty minutes from Cape Town International. We'll have a car waiting at arrivals.

No booking fees

Book direct and pay exactly what you see — no agents, no surcharges, ever.

Stay flexible

Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival on every direct booking.

A look inside

"

The view from the bed alone is worth the trip, and the service never missed a beat. Faultless from check-in to checkout.

LR
Lara & Ruan
Pretoria · Mar 2026
"

Pools, spa, the food — everything is a ten. And booking direct meant the price never crept up. We're already back in December.

JM
Jess M.
London · Feb 2026
"

The city's best-kept secret. Steps from everything, Table Mountain out the window, a cocktail always within reach.

TK
Thabo K.
Durban · Jan 2026
Book direct · the price you see is the price you pay

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
